surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal compliance producer/render change (dashboard rows, audit-report suggestion gating + staleness banner). No app UI/API/CLI surface; the user-facing output is the compliance markdown, verified empirically by regenerating dashboard.md + audit-report.md against both the monorepo and shipwright-webui event logs (logged in the iterate spec) plus 868 pytest cases.

behaviors.behavior: Bloat over-limit (grandfathered) renders INFO, never WARN (events + legacy modes)
Ratchet delta remains the WARN-bearing bloat signal
iterate_test_coverage excludes satisfied-no-FR; retains FR-linked + behavior-affecting work
Dashboard 'Iterate tests passing' row uses the testable denominator + new wording
Audit _Suggested: line renders only on status==fail (suppresses pass/skip)
Staleness banner: stamp / idempotent-churn-free / noop-absent / overwrite-clears
update_compliance stamps the marker on --phase iterate, skips on --phase compliance
